command.name: UserInformation
command.text: select case when isnull(a.nickname, '') = '' then a.name else a.nickname end as nickname, isnull(a.chat_ns_yn, 0) as chat_ns_yn, isnull(b.rkey, '') as imagekey from userinfo2 a left join hreanh b on rtrim(a.id) = rtrim(b.stt_rec) where a.id = @@userID select distinct b.id, b.name, case when isnull(nickname, '') = '' then b.name else b.nickname end as nickname from groupshare a, userinfo2 b where a.user_id0 = @@userID and dbo.ff_ExactInlist(rtrim(b.name), rtrim(a.user_lst)) = 1 select id, ten_nhom, user_lst from groupshare where user_id0 = @@userID

command.name: LogMessage
command.text: insert into chatlog(chat_id, chat_sender, chat_receiver, chat_content, message_status, datetime0) select lower(replace(newid(), '-', '')), @$senderID, @$receiverID, @$chatContent, @$chatStatus, @$chatTime if @$receiverOn = 0 begin declare @htmlContent nvarchar(4000) set @htmlContent = replace(dbo.FastBusiness$Function$EncodeHtml(@$chatContent), char(10), '</br>') exec FastBusiness$Notify$Post '15', '', '', @$chatTime, @$chatTime, @htmlContent, @htmlContent, null, '', '', '', '', @$receiverID, '', '', '', '@@appDatabaseName', @@userID end

command.name: GetMessage
command.text: declare @q nvarchar(4000) select top 0 chat_sender, chat_receiver, chat_content, datetime0 into #r from chatlog set @q = 'insert into #r select top ' + ltrim(@$messageLoading) + ' chat_sender, chat_receiver, chat_content, datetime0 from chatlog' + ' where (chat_sender = ' + ltrim(@$senderID) + ' or chat_receiver = ' + ltrim(@$senderID) + ') and (chat_sender = ' + ltrim(@$receiverID) + ' or chat_receiver = ' + ltrim(@$receiverID) + ')' + ' order by datetime0 desc' + char(13) + 'select * from #r' exec sp_executesql @q
